{"problem_standardized_math":"Show that the vector defined by\n\\[\n\\bar d=-\\left(I-\\frac{\\nabla c_1(x)\\nabla c_1(x)^T}{\\|\\nabla c_1(x)\\|^2}\\right)\\nabla f(x),\n\\qquad\nd=\\frac{\\bar d}{\\|\\bar d\\|},\n\\]\nsatisfies\n\\[\n\\nabla c_1(x)^T d=0\n\\quad \\text{and} \\quad\n\\nabla f(x)^T d<0,\n\\]\nwhenever the first-order optimality condition\n\\[\n\\nabla f(x^\\star)=\\lambda_1^\\star\\nabla c_1(x^\\star)\n\\]\nis not satisfied."}
